positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric floral mandalas design. The main subject is a cluster of abstract, interlocking flower shapes and leaves, rendered in a crisp line art style with bold, solid color fills (teal, mustard yellow, and burnt orange). The composition must be centered and highly contrasted, designed to repeat cleanly across fabric. Background should be pure white, providing maximum negative space. Use a sophisticated, mid-century modern aesthetic mixed with sacred geometry principles. Minimal detail on the background, maximum impact on the central design elements. Flat graphic illustration, vector art quality, high contrast silhouette.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, artifacts, bad anatomy, noise, realistic photo, 3d rendering, gradient, gradient shading
